meta.description: Generates a polished ~90-second product launch video (1920×1080, 16:9) from scratch. Claude writes a 6-scene script, ElevenLabs narrates it, DALL-E 3 creates cinematic backgrounds, Shotstack assembles with animated CSS text reveals, gradient overlays, and background music.
meta.output: 1920×1080 MP4, ~90 seconds — ready for YouTube, LinkedIn, and website hero section
meta.trigger: POST /launch-video  body: see __setup_notes.webhook_params for all options

nodes.name: Webhook: Trigger Launch Video
nodes.notes:
POST with product details. All fields are optional — defaults to SNG Advisors / Floatup.
See __setup_notes.webhook_params for the full list of customisable fields.

options.responseBody: {"status":"queued","message":"Launch video generation started. ~8-10 min. You'll get an email when ready."}

parameters.jsCode:
const b = $input.first().json.body || {};

// Merge caller params with SNG / Floatup defaults
return [{
  json: {
    product_name:     b.product_name    || 'Floatup',
    company_name:     b.company_name    || 'SNG Advisors',
    tagline:          b.tagline         || 'India\'s Compliance OS for CA Firms',
    target_audience:  b.target_audience || 'Indian CA and CPA firms',
    problem:          b.problem         || 'CA firms lose 40% of their time on manual compliance tracking, missed deadlines, and scattered client documents',
    key_features:     b.key_features    || ['Automated compliance task generation', 'Team task & approval workflows', 'Client document portal with reminders'],
    stat_1_number:    b.stat_1_number   || '100+',
    stat_1_label:     b.stat_1_label    || 'CA firms onboarded',
    stat_2_number:    b.stat_2_number   || '10,000+',
    stat_2_label:     b.stat_2_label    || 'tasks automated monthly',
    stat_3_number:    b.stat_3_number   || '15 hrs',
    stat_3_label:     b.stat_3_label    || 'saved per firm per week',
    testimonial:      b.testimonial     || 'Floatup eliminated our missed deadlines entirely. Every task, every client, every due date — all in one place.',
    testimonial_by:   b.testimonial_by  || '— CA Practice Owner, Mumbai',
    cta_text:         b.cta_text        || 'Start free at sng-adwisers.com',
    website_url:      b.website_url     || 'https://sng-adwisers.com',
    logo_url:         b.logo_url        || '',
    screenshot_url:   b.screenshot_url  || '',
    music_url:        b.music_url       || '',
    brand_color:      b.brand_color     || '#0d9488',
    duration_seconds: b.duration_seconds || 90,
    visual_style:     b.visual_style    || 'cinematic dark navy and teal, modern SaaS aesthetic, professional, high contrast, no people'
  }
}];

nodes.name: Code: Set Product Parameters
nodes.notes:
Merges caller-provided params with SNG Advisors / Floatup defaults.
Pass any field in the webhook body to override the default.
See __setup_notes.webhook_params for full reference.

nodes.name: Claude: Write Launch Video Script
nodes.notes:
Claude writes a 6-scene, 90-second launch video script with:
  • Narrator spoken text per scene
  • On-screen headline + subtext per scene
  • DALL-E 3 image prompt per scene (cinematic background)

Uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (same key as Flow 01).

nodes.name: Code: Parse Launch Script
nodes.notes:
Parses Claude's structured output into 6 scene objects:
  • index, title, narration, headline, subtext, imagePrompt
Also concatenates all narration into one string for ElevenLabs TTS.

nodes.name: ElevenLabs: Generate Narrator Voiceover
nodes.notes:
Generates a single full-length MP3 narration track from all 6 scenes joined together.
ElevenLabs handles natural pauses between sentences.

Tip: For a launch video, use a deep confident male voice:
  ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID = VR6AewLTigWG4xSOukaG (Arnold)
or a clear authoritative female:
  ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID = EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL (Bella)

nodes.name: Supabase Storage: Upload Narrator Audio
nodes.notes:
Uploads narration MP3 to Supabase Storage bucket 'content-audio/launch/'.
Bucket must be PUBLIC (same bucket used in Flow 04 — no additional setup needed).

nodes.name: Code: Build Scene Image Items
nodes.notes:
Emits one item per scene (6 items). Each carries the full product params + per-scene data:
  • scene_index, scene_headline, scene_subtext — for Shotstack HTML overlays
  • scene_image_prompt — for DALL-E 3 background generation
  • audio_url — Supabase public URL for the narration track

nodes.name: Process Scenes Loop
nodes.notes:
Output 0 → DALL-E 3 (current scene)
Output 1 → Code: Assemble Shotstack Timeline (all 6 scenes done)

nodes.name: DALL-E 3: Generate Scene Background
nodes.notes:
Generates a 1792×1024 (16:9) HD cinematic background for each scene.
Using 'hd' quality (vs standard) for a launch video — sharper details, better composition.
Cost: $0.08/image × 6 scenes = $0.48 for the 6 backgrounds.

nodes.name: Code: Extract Scene Image URL
nodes.notes:
Extracts DALL-E URL and carries scene metadata forward.
All 6 scene items are collected by the Assemble node after the loop finishes.

nodes.name: Code: Assemble Shotstack Launch Timeline
nodes.notes:
Builds a cinematic 1920×1080 Shotstack timeline with 6 scenes:

  Scene 0 — Brand hero: product name scales in with teal glow
  Scene 1 — Problem: headline slides in from left with orange accent
  Scene 2 — Solution reveal: product name with teal glow pulse
  Scene 3 — Features: headline + subtext slide up
  Scene 4 — Social proof: 3 stat blocks + testimonial quote
  Scene 5 — CTA: product name + teal CTA button + website URL

  + Dark scrim over all scenes (text always readable)
  + Optional logo top-left
  + Teal progress bar (bottom edge, full video)
  + Optional background music at 12% volume mix
  + Alternate zoomIn/zoomOut Ken Burns on backgrounds
  + Fade transitions between all scenes

nodes.name: Shotstack: Start Render
nodes.notes:
Submits 1920×1080 render to Shotstack.

Sandbox (free, watermarked): https://api.shotstack.io/stage/render
Production ($0.09/render):    https://api.shotstack.io/v1/render

Recommended: test on sandbox first, flip to /v1/ for final version.

nodes.name: Wait: 2 Min (1920×1080 Render)
nodes.notes: 1920×1080 HD renders take 90-180s on Shotstack. 2 minutes is a solid first check.

parameters.rawBody:
={{ const d = $input.first().json; JSON.stringify({ from: 'Floatup Content ', to: ['saksham.gpt2001@gmail.com'], subject: `🚀 Launch video ready — ${d.product_name}`, html: `

🚀 Your launch video is ready

1920×1080 · 90s · Cinematic · AI-generated

${d.product_name} Launch Video

6 scenes · ElevenLabs narration · DALL-E 3 HD backgrounds · CSS-animated text reveals · Shotstack render

▶ Watch Launch Video

What to do next

  1. Watch the video — check narration pacing, text legibility, scene order
  2. If you want re-renders, tweak the webhook params and fire again (costs ~$0.78)
  3. Add your own logo by passing logo_url in the webhook body
  4. Add background music by passing music_url (royalty-free MP3 URL)
  5. Upload to YouTube as a full video + also as a Short (crop to 9:16 in YouTube Studio)

Render ID: ${d.render_id} · ${new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN',{timeZone:'Asia/Kolkata'})} IST

` }) }}

env_vars.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Same key used in Flow 01 — no new setup
env_vars.ELEVENLABS_API_KEY: Same key used in Flow 04 — no new setup
env_vars.ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID: For a launch video use a confident voice. Arnold: VR6AewLTigWG4xSOukaG (deep male) or Bella: EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL (professional female)
env_vars.OPENAI_API_KEY: Same key used in Flow 04 — no new setup
env_vars.SHOTSTACK_API_KEY: Same key used in Flow 04 — no new setup
env_vars.RESEND_API_KEY: Same key used in all flows — no new setup

webhook_params.tagline: string  — default: 'India's Compliance OS for CA Firms'
webhook_params.target_audience: string  — who the video is for
webhook_params.problem: string  — the pain point your product solves
webhook_params.testimonial_by: string  — attribution e.g. '— CA Practice Owner, Mumbai'
webhook_params.logo_url: string  — (optional) public URL to your logo PNG/SVG — overlaid top-left
webhook_params.screenshot_url: string  — (optional) product screenshot URL — passed to Claude for context
webhook_params.music_url: string  — (optional) royalty-free background music MP3 URL at 12% volume mix. Royalty-free sources: pixabay.com/music, freemusicarchive.org
webhook_params.brand_color: string  — hex e.g. '#0d9488' — used for all text accents, CTA button, progress bar
webhook_params.visual_style: string  — DALL-E style guidance for backgrounds

output_spec.cdn_url: Permanent Shotstack CDN URL in the notification email

__setup_notes.total_time: ~8-10 minutes (Claude ~10s + ElevenLabs ~10s + 6× DALL-E 3 HD ~15s each + Shotstack render ~2-3 min)
__setup_notes.rerender_tip: To change just one scene, tweak the webhook params and fire again — the whole pipeline re-runs for $0.70. Much cheaper than a human editor.
